description: C26B-004 perf regression gate baseline. Populated by main-branch bench runs (collect phase). Each entry's `sample_count` must reach `min_samples_required` before the gate applies its +10% tolerance hard-fail. Until then, the entry is treated as WARN-only.
update_policy: main-branch push bench.yml job auto-refreshes `ns_median` and increments `sample_count`. Manual edits are discouraged except to add/remove benches. When a bench is intentionally changed (new fixture, algorithmic change), reset its `sample_count` to 0 and document the reason in `notes`.
